description: The single final engineering track: absorbs all remaining implementation across 9 active tracks + DEPLOY-TODO code items so that when it ships the only work left is `railway up` + secret/guardian-set provisioning. Phases: A correctness blockers (sagas-inert fix, warnings), B real cross-chain value primitives (Solana signer, bridge lock/burn/verify, reconcile-retry, custody), C quest F2-F7, D fractionalization + ecosystem tree, E data/query hygiene, F saga operator surface, G doc+bookkeeping close-out.
